channel.title: Typesetting on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Typesetting on Arrans github.io

item.title: typst/typst
item.description: A markup-based typesetting system that is powerful and easy to learn.

item.title: tectonic-typesetting/tectonic
item.description: A modernized, complete, self-contained TeX/LaTeX engine, powered by XeTeX and TeXLive.

item.title: speedata/publisher
item.description: speedata Publisher - a professional database Publishing system
